title: GameAudioGDC Sound Effects Archive
creator: Sonniss
description: An annual collection of professionally recorded sound-effect samples released around GDC. The archive spans ambiences, vehicles, impacts, interfaces, creatures, machinery, and many specialist recordings.
useful: It provides legal production material for learning and commercial media work; users should still read the current license and observe its AI-training restriction.
audience: Sound designers, students, and small teams needing source recordings for legitimate media production.
learning: Locate source material by sound category
Turn raw recordings into project-specific assets
Check license terms before using a library

manualLinkStatus.note: The official Sonniss GameAudioGDC archive opened in a browser and states its access and media-production licensing terms; automated requests receive 403.

editorial.note: Official archive, free access, and current sound-effects licensing statement manually verified.
